text:
Done. Here's what was created:

---

## Summary

**Milestone created:** `v25-install-distribution` — *Cross-Platform Binary Distribution*

> Vision: Any user can install sdlc on macOS, Linux, or Windows with a one-liner — no Rust toolchain, no make, no build step required.

**4 features:**

| Feature | What it delivers |
|---|---|
| `dist-cargo-toml-fixes` | Two-line Cargo.toml fix: switch Linux target to musl, set install-path to `~/.local/bin` |
| `dist-release-infra` | Track Jordan's 4 manual GitHub steps: create `sdlc-releases` + `homebrew-tap` repos, set `GH_RELEASES_TOKEN` + `HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN` secrets |
| `dist-developer-docs` | Update DEVELOPER.md: cross-platform dev install path, replace make dependency with `cargo install --path .` |
| `dist-first-release` | Tag v0.1.0, trigger CI build matrix, verify install scripts work on macOS/Linux/Windows |

**Ponder linked:** `install-distribution.manifest.yaml` updated with `committed_to: [v25-install-distribution]`

---

**Note:** Phase 4 (code signing, SBOM, enterprise distribution guide) was deliberately deferred per the ponder decisions — Jordan confirmed it's post-v1. It can become a separate milestone when enterprise customers request it.

**Next:**
```
/sdlc-prepare v25-install-distribution
```

## Summary

> Vision: Any user can install sdlc on macOS, Linux, or Windows with a one-liner — no Rust toolchain, no make, no build step required.

**4 features:**

| Feature | What it delivers |
|---|---|
